name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Brunswick, OH's 5 Star Car Title Loans at 416 Pearl Rd offers quick car title loans with fast approval for local residents.
description_long:
Located at 416 Pearl Rd in Brunswick, OH, 5 Star Car Title Loans is a standalone storefront serving Brunswick residents seeking quick car title loans. The location operates Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, with Saturday hours from 10AM to 5PM, providing convenient access during the workweek and weekend. This Brunswick branch welcomes customers who need flexible financing options backed by their vehicle's title.

The Brunswick location offers car title loans designed for residents needing quick cash. To learn more about loan terms, approval process, or to submit an application, customers can call the Brunswick store directly at (330) 632-1718. The team can discuss your specific financial needs and help determine eligibility for title-based lending.

When visiting the Brunswick, OH store, bring your government-issued ID, proof of vehicle ownership/title, proof of residency, and proof of income. 5 Star Car Title Loans specializes in providing fast approval for borrowers who may not qualify for traditional bank loans, making it a practical option for Brunswick residents facing unexpected expenses.
pros: Loan amounts up to $50,000 via vehicle collateral—significantly higher than typical payday loans
Same-day funding available for approved applicants
No prepayment penalties—borrowers can pay off early without additional fees
Licensed and regulated lender operating since 2012 with 255K+ loans funded
Accepts alternative vehicle collateral including motorcycles and semi-trucks
Transparent terms advertised with no hidden fees
Available across ~18 states with multiple physical locations for in-person service
Willing to work with borrowers having imperfect or no credit history
cons: APR and finance charges not disclosed on website—total cost of borrowing unclear
Risk of vehicle repossession if loan defaults, despite 'keep your car' messaging
Loan availability and terms vary significantly by state due to regulatory differences
Title loan debt cycle risk—high-interest secured debt can become unmanageable
Customer reviews are self-selected on their own site, not independent third-party verification
best_for: Vehicle owners with equity who need quick cash and have limited credit access
Borrowers facing urgent expenses (rent, bills, repairs) who can repay within months
Individuals requiring loans larger than typical payday loan caps ($500–$1,000)
Consumers in 5 Star's 18-state service area who prefer in-person lending options
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best for vehicle owners in urgent financial need who have equity in their car but lack traditional credit access and can repay within 24 months. The primary caveat is that title loans are high-risk secured debt—if you default, the lender can repossess your vehicle, and undisclosed APRs suggest borrowing costs may be substantially higher than advertised.
services: Car title loans ($100–$50,000 with vehicle as collateral)
Installment loans with fixed monthly payments up to 24 months
Same-day cash loans for urgent expenses
Secure application processing with 256-bit SSL/TLS encryption
Vehicle retention during loan period (borrower keeps driving)
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 416 Pearl Rd, Brunswick, OH. Fast approval car title loans for local residents.
